headline: Tango Therapeutics (TNGX) Is Down 10.7% After Pipeline Pivot And Board Changes - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Tango Therapeutics, Inc. recently reported first-quarter 2026 results showing a net loss of US$45.51 million, no collaboration revenue after its Gilead research term ended, and the resignations of directors Alexis Borisy and Kanishka Pothula, with Sung Lee appointed Lead Independent Director. Alongside a cash balance of about US$380 million expected to fund operations into 2028, the company is refocusing its oncology pipeline by prioritizing MTAP-deleted selective PRMT5 programs and...

headline: Evaluating Gilead Sciences (GILD) Valuation After Q1 Beat Guidance Shift And New HIV Priority Review
summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) is back in focus after a busy stretch that combined stronger than expected first quarter results, sharply revised full year loss guidance tied to acquisition related charges, and a priority FDA review for a new HIV regimen. See our latest analysis for Gilead Sciences. Even with the recent news flurry around Q1 results, revised guidance and fresh bond issues, Gilead Sciences' share price has eased in the short term, with a 30 day share price return of 7.29% and a 90 day...
